note: Reference config for the backend technical-data pipeline (source of input/technicals_input.json). The Claude Code Routine itself does not read this file - it follows routine_instruction.md directly.

technical_api.response_path_note: quant_analysis is returned as a JSON-encoded STRING, not a nested object - must be JSON.parse()'d before use.
technical_api.extraction_note: Only carry ticker, company, date, latest, moving_averages, performance, and history from the parsed quant_analysis into input/technicals_input.json. Drop signal, classification, verdict, scores, levels, analysis, trade_plan, and institutional_view - those are the PREVIOUS run's AI-generated conclusions and must not be fed back in as if they were fresh input.
technical_api.deal_type_note: deal_type is required per ticker and is NOT uniformly 'IPO' - confirmed values below; TODO_CONFIRM entries still need a real value from the backend/deals team before this ticker can be fetched.
